description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray concrete or stucco, with large rectangular windows arranged asymmetrically across the facade. The front features a recessed entryway with a wooden accent panel and a small landscaped area, including a palm tree and planters. There is a driveway leading to a covered garage on the right side, and the property is bordered by a low perimeter wall. The rear of the house includes a private patio area with outdoor seating and additional greenery. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding urban environment.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, light gray exterior, large windows, and a recessed entryway with landscaping and a garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed entryway, garage, palm tree, and main street-facing facade.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side yard, upper story, and patio area with outdoor furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private patio, outdoor seating, and back windows.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the garage entrance, driveway, and additional landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryway with a wooden accent, steps, and landscaped planters; no porch or columns.
